text:
video assistant referee, in association football, match official that reviews decisions made by the head referee with the use of video footage, also known as VAR, video assistant referees. Attributes include: 
- instance of: "profession"
- subclass of: "referee"
- sport: "association football"
- Commons category: "Video assistant referee"
- female form of label: "árbitru asistente de videu",
 "video asistentka rozhodčího",
 "árbitra assistente de vídeo"
- short name: "VAR"
